s: A shortcut to the Android Health Connect.
d:
This is a shortcut to the Android Health Connect that usually is buried inside the device settings under Settings > Security & Privacy > Privacy Controls > Health Connect.

It doesn’t install or enable anything, it only opens the already present Health Connect based on the AOSP ("com.android.healthconnect"), Google API ("com.google.android.healthconnect") or the PlayStore version ("com.google.android.apps.healthdata").
